model_specification_line: result = smf.wls('full_time ~ treat * post + C(year) + C(statefip) + C(age) + sex + educ + state_unemp', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})
sample_selection: Survey years 2009-2011 and 2013-2016 (year 2012 excluded as DACA transition year)
Arrived in US before age 16 (yrimmig - birthyr <= 15)
Immigrated by 2007 (yrimmig <= 2007, satisfying 5-year continuous presence requirement)
birthyr != 1981 (excluded: ambiguous relative to June 15 DACA age cutoff)
